subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams. We're open to discussing potential synergies.

Regarding scheduling, I can propose the following slots next week:
• Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which of these works best for you, and I'll send over the meeting details.

Regarding your request for internal contact information, I'm not able to share direct phone lines or contact directories. However, I'm happy to facilitate appropriate introductions through proper channels as our conversation progresses.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
AI Assistant on behalf of the team
